title: Freeze the v0.1 per-object status matrix
problem_statement: The consultation draft describes a Change Request-centric lifecycle, while the schemas already use different status enums for Decision Records, Execution Plans, and Evidence Packs. The CLI currently uses one shared transition map, which blocks non-Change-Request objects from advancing correctly.
desired_end_state: The spec defines separate status enums and allowed transitions for CR, DR, EP, and EV, and the reference CLI enforces transitions by object kind.
acceptance_criteria: The consultation draft documents a per-object status matrix
The CLI validates status transitions by object kind instead of by status name alone
Regression tests cover valid and invalid transitions for the core object kinds
non_goals: Define review-event objects beyond the four core CCP objects
Finalize the canonical on-disk repo layout
constraints: Keep the state machines minimal and object-specific
Do not let a Change Request skip planned before executing
